cafe.name: The Morning Rush
cafe.description: Regulars at the corner café each ordered a different drink and a different pastry one busy morning. Work out who had what.
clues: Hazelnut goes with exactly two of Greta, Cortado, Danish, and $5.
Onyx goes with at least four of Greta, Espresso, Bagel, Hazelnut, and $8.
Dane's price is higher than both the order with the Tart and the order with Almond syrup.
If Tart does not go with Ava, then Ava goes with Ristretto.
Either Cortado goes with Cobalt or Ava goes with Almond.
Espresso, Ristretto, and Almond go with Ben, Greta, and $7, in some order.
Cinnamon goes with at most one of Dane, Espresso, Tart, Onyx, and $7.
Either Cinnamon goes with Ben or $5 goes with Ava.
If either Ava goes with Crimson or Espresso goes with Hazelnut (but not both), then Ristretto goes with Greta.
Dane goes with exactly two of Ristretto, Maple, Crimson, and $6.
Exactly two of these are true: Ava goes with Latte; Dane goes with Croissant; Greta goes with $8.

kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Duke goes with exactly two of Rowan, Chisel, Horseshoes, and 5 coins.
Potter goes with at least four of Rowan, Hammer, Barrels, Duke, and 8 coins.
Edmund's levy is higher than both the artisan who makes Tapestries and the artisan serving the Baron.
If Tapestries does not go with Aldric, then Aldric goes with Saw.
Either Chisel goes with Carpenter or Aldric goes with Baron.
Hammer, Saw, and Baron go with Beatrix, Rowan, and 7 coins, in some order.
Countess goes with at most one of Edmund, Hammer, Tapestries, Potter, and 7 coins.
Either Countess goes with Beatrix or 5 coins goes with Aldric.
If either Aldric goes with Cooper or Hammer goes with Duke (but not both), then Saw goes with Rowan.
Edmund goes with exactly two of Saw, Earl, Cooper, and 6 coins.
Exactly two of these are true: Aldric goes with Loom; Edmund goes with Candles; Rowan goes with 8 coins.

dnd.name: The Adventuring Party
dnd.description: A band of adventurers gathers at the tavern — each a different race, wielding a different weapon. Work out who's who.
clues: Evocation goes with exactly two of Wrenna, Dragonborn, Rogue, and 41 gp.
Toad goes with at least four of Wrenna, Gnome, Paladin, Evocation, and 56 gp.
Sable's gold is higher than both the Wizard and the Abjuration mage.
If Wizard does not go with Fenwick, then Fenwick goes with Halfling.
Either Dragonborn goes with Hawk or Fenwick goes with Abjuration.
Gnome, Halfling, and Abjuration go with Orin, Wrenna, and 51 gp, in some order.
Divination goes with at most one of Sable, Gnome, Wizard, Toad, and 51 gp.
Either Divination goes with Orin or 41 gp goes with Fenwick.
If either Fenwick goes with Owl or Gnome goes with Evocation (but not both), then Halfling goes with Wrenna.
Sable goes with exactly two of Halfling, Illusion, Owl, and 46 gp.
Exactly two of these are true: Fenwick goes with Half-Orc; Sable goes with Ranger; Wrenna goes with 56 gp.

space.name: The Mars Colony
space.description: The first colonists of a new Mars settlement each took a different role and hail from a different world. Work out who's who.
clues: Europa goes with exactly two of Okafor, Engineer, Drift, and 7 ly.
Lichen goes with at least four of Okafor, Geologist, Aurora, Europa, and 10 ly.
Dasari's distance is higher than both the colonist in the Lumen module and the colonist from Callisto.
If Lumen does not go with Anders, then Anders goes with Technician.
Either Engineer goes with Basalt or Anders goes with Callisto.
Geologist, Technician, and Callisto go with Bauer, Okafor, and 9 ly, in some order.
Earth goes with at most one of Dasari, Geologist, Lumen, Lichen, and 9 ly.
Either Earth goes with Bauer or 7 ly goes with Anders.
If either Anders goes with Diatoms or Geologist goes with Europa (but not both), then Technician goes with Okafor.
Dasari goes with exactly two of Technician, Ganymede, Diatoms, and 8 ly.
Exactly two of these are true: Anders goes with Medic; Dasari goes with Cortex; Okafor goes with 10 ly.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: Boden's goes with exactly two of Nadia, French, Maple, and 1400.
Skewer goes with at least four of Nadia, Italian, Boxwood, Boden's, and 1550.
Judit's rating is higher than both the player with the Walnut set and the player known for the Anastasia's mate.
If Walnut does not go with Anatoly, then Anatoly goes with Slav.
Either French goes with Fork or Anatoly goes with Anastasia's.
Italian, Slav, and Anastasia's go with Boris, Nadia, and 1500, in some order.
Back-rank goes with at most one of Judit, Italian, Walnut, Skewer, and 1500.
Either Back-rank goes with Boris or 1400 goes with Anatoly.
If either Anatoly goes with Gambit or Italian goes with Boden's (but not both), then Slav goes with Nadia.
Judit goes with exactly two of Slav, Damiano's, Gambit, and 1450.
